title: Three
actors: Velimir 'Bata' Zivojinovic, Ali Raner, Slobodan 'Cica' Perovic
plot: Three stories are set at the beginning, middle and the end of WW2. In all three of them the hero of the movie must witness the death of people he likes.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
